sections.paragraph:
verb לשים

to put, place, lay, set; make, cause; appoint

verb לשום

to assess, value

verb להשים

to place, set up, put; make

verb להשים

to pretend, put oneself

verb הושם

be placed, set up, put

masculine noun

name, reputation, fame, moniker, denomination, distinction

adverb

there, thither, yon; ibid (reference to a book) , idem

masculine noun שמים

sky, heaven
